# HPD.ML.Regression.OrdinaryLeastSquaresLearner

- Package: `HPD-ML-Regression` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Regression`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Regression`
- Kind: `class`
- Guide: [Related documentation](../../../training/regression/ordinary-least-squares.md)

Ordinary Least Squares regression via L-BFGS with analytic gradients. Minimizes (1/2n) Σ (w·x + b - y)² + regularization.

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class OrdinaryLeastSquaresLearner : HPD.ML.Abstractions.ILearner
```
